title: Converting SQL Server types and rules to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud's Database Migration Service enables developers to convert SQL Server schemas and code to PostgreSQL equivalents using Gemini as an AI tutor. The service assists with type conversions like SQL Server user-defined types to PostgreSQL DOMAINs while explaining the migration process.
writeup: This video shows how Google Cloud's Database Migration Service converts SQL Server schemas and code into PostgreSQL equivalents, with Gemini acting as an AI tutor that explains each step of the migration. It covers type conversions such as mapping SQL Server user-defined types to PostgreSQL DOMAINs. The practical takeaway is that the service handles schema conversion while surfacing the reasoning behind the changes, making the migration process more transparent.
